sections.paragraph: pr.n. (“whose help is Hadad,” i.e. Adodus; see under בֶּן־הֲדַד ) Hadadezer, king of Syria of Zobah, a cotemporary of David, 2Sa 8:3, sqq. In other places there occurs הֲדַרֶעֶזֶר 10:16 , 19 2Sa 10:19 1Ch 19:16, 19 1Ch 19:19but however, in all the passages, there are MSS. which contain the former reading, which is far preferable.
